items.label: Basalt
items.description: Fine-grained mafic volcanic rock; common in Martian plains.

items.label: Hematite
items.description: Iron oxide mineral; often forms in aqueous environments.

items.label: Olivine
items.description: Magnesium-iron silicate; weathers slowly in dry climates.

items.label: Sulfate
items.description: Evaporite mineral suite; marker of past brine activity.

items.label: Mudstone
items.description: Lithified mud; may preserve fine-scale sedimentary structure.

items.label: Iron meteorite
items.description: Metallic meteoritic iron-nickel alloy fragment.

items.label: Iron (Fe)
items.description: Trace iron sample extracted via LIBS-guided drilling.

items.label: Silicon (Si)
items.description: Trace silicon sample. Key indicator of silicate mineralogy.

items.label: Manganese (Mn)
items.description: Trace manganese — enrichment suggests oxidizing conditions.

items.label: Magnesium (Mg)
items.description: Trace magnesium from mafic mineral breakdown.

items.label: Aluminum (Al)
items.description: Trace aluminum — common in feldspar-bearing rocks.

items.label: Calcium (Ca)
items.description: Trace calcium from carbonate or sulfate precipitation.

items.label: Sodium (Na)
items.description: Trace sodium — indicator of evaporite or plagioclase.

items.label: Titanium (Ti)
items.description: Trace titanium from ilmenite or volcanic glass.

items.label: Sulfur (S)
items.description: Trace sulfur — volcanic or evaporite origin.

items.label: Nickel (Ni)
items.description: Trace nickel — meteoritic signature element.

items.label: Engineering components (EC)
items.description: Standard engineering parts kit. Used for repairs on engineering systems.

items.label: Science components (SC)
items.description: Sensors, optics, and lab subassemblies. Used for repairs on science instruments.

items.label: Mechatronics components (MC)
items.description: Actuators, harnesses, and mechanisms. Used for crafting buildables.

items.label: Digital components (DC)
items.description: High-reliability compute and comms modules. Used for digital subsystems.

items.label: Welding wire
items.description: Consumable filler for structural repairs in the field.

items.label: Subsurface Ice
items.description: Water ice extracted from DAN-confirmed drill sites. Used as a reagent in SAM wet chemistry analysis.
